title: Golden Jubilee Dinner
occasion: Commemorating fifty years of service and shared milestones
host_line: The Board of Trustees requests the pleasure of your presence at a formal anniversary dinner.
message: Celebrate five decades of institutional legacy with commemorative remarks, archival tributes, and an elegant seated supper.
time_line: Reception at 7:00 PM | Dinner at 8:00 PM
highlights: Live ensemble and formal dinner service
footer_note: Limited commemorative seating cards will be issued at the entrance.
